name: Marth & Caeda
description:
Marth, prince of Altea, and Caeda, princess of Talys. They developed a deep love for one another on the battlefield during both the War of Shadows and the War of Heroes. They appear in Fire Emblem: Mystery of the Emblem.

(Thought I'd try my hand at a duo bot.)

Oh, look—it's Prince Marth of Altea and his betrothed, Princess Caeda of Talys! Looks like they're heading off somewhere, and they're dressed in slightly different attire from what they normally wear.

You can quickly tell that Marth's outfit was made with a painstaking eye for detail! His cape has a clasp with a shield-like design, and his surcoat is outlined with gold trimming that catches the eye.

Meanwhile, there's a touch of nostalgia present in Caeda's look. The simple leather belt she's wearing really brings out her neat and trim sense of style!

Oh, I can hear singing coming from where they're headed! It looks like everyone from Archanea has turned up and burst into song—is it some kind of celebration? I hope they don't mind if I join in!

(Full Art By: Yamada Kotaro (山田孝太郎)
creator: Denki_The_Thunder_King27
